## Summary

Describe the change.

## Type

- [ ] Doctrine or terminology
- [ ] Agent skill behavior
- [ ] Example or case study
- [ ] Packaging or repository maintenance
- [ ] Documentation polish

## Alignment Check

- [ ] `README.md` remains the canonical human-readable reference.
- [ ] `SKILL.md` remains aligned with the README.
- [ ] The package remains usable without consumer edits.
- [ ] The change preserves consumer sovereignty, durable rails, independent skins, shared state, and rails-enforced policy.
